title: No Sleep | You May Not Rest
description: Removes sleeping. Keeps bed spawn logic.
body:
Prevents skipping the night but still allows beds to function as respawn anchors. Great for increasing the difficulty of survival worlds by forcing players to survive the night—or just for trolling your friends.

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fed9535ffc0f4958df172ae93e577471e4310bb7.png)

Required only on the server side  
Available for Forge, NeoForge, and Fabric  
Fabric version requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

This project is open source  
Feel free to fork it

moi-tripa

[Curse Forge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-sleep)
